allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "E:\\ClaudioFolder\\Turnoalcorte\\.env" -Raw; Write-Host "=== RAW .env ===" ; Write-Host $content.Length "chars total"; foreach \($line in $content -split "`n"\) { $key = \($line -split "="\)[0]; $val = \($line -split "=",2\)[1]; Write-Host "KEY: '$key' | VALUE starts with: '$\($val.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(20, $val.Length\)\)\)...' | Length: $\($val.Length\)" })

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; ['@dnd-kit/core','@dnd-kit/utilities','@dnd-kit/sortable','zustand','sonner','cmdk'].forEach\(k => console.log\(k, deps[k] ?? 'MISSING'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('playwright:', p.devDependencies?.['@playwright/test'] ?? 'MISSING'\); console.log\('sentry:', p.dependencies?.['@sentry/react'] ?? 'MISSING'\); console.log\('test script:', p.scripts?.test ?? 'none'\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('playwright:', p.devDependencies['@playwright/test']\); console.log\('sentry:', p.dependencies['@sentry/react']\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}; ['react-hook-form','@hookform/resolvers','zod','date-fns','framer-motion'].forEach\(d => console.log\(d, deps[d] ?? 'MISSING'\)\)")
